ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "word" TEXT /* The lexical term being analyzed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the term was created in the system */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaires" (
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the questionnaire */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who created the questionnaire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the questionnaire (e.g., draft, active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the questionnaire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the questionnaire was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the questionnaire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaires_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the questionnaire it belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the question was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the question was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question it belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the answer */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the answer is accepted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the answer was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the answer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the term being analyzed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the metric */,
  "questions_count" INTEGER /* Count of questions associated with the term */,
  "answers_count" INTEGER /* Count of answers associated with the term */,
  "accepted_count" INTEGER /* Count of accepted responses for the term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_metrics_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
